hub.name: DarkLegion Client Mods Hub
hub.description: Official mod repository for DarkLegion RF Online. Download client modifications, visual enhancements, and utility tools.

mods.name: Sette DarkMode
mods.author: DarkLegion Team
mods.description:
Completely remastered texture set for the RF Online client. All world textures, character skins, and equipment models upscaled to 4x resolution using AI-assisted upscaling.

Includes:
- World terrain textures (1024x → 4096x)
- Character skin textures (512x → 2048x)
- Equipment and weapon models
- UI element upscales

Note: Requires at least 2 GB of VRAM for best performance.
